no: Item randomizer by Wisp. Randomizes item placement, stores, scrolls, and treasure. Mode 1 uses in-game scripts, Mode 2 uses WeiDU patching. Creature "no items" components require a randomise mode installed first. cn:550 excluded (non-EE only)
ic: Mode 1 clashes with Dungeon-be-Gone & Skip Candlekeep, Systematic changes to the BG2 proficiency, like using IWD or BG1 style, will cause (at least) Mode 2 randomization to break on v7.

conflicts.reason: Randomiser Mode 1 (in-game scripts) clashes with Skip Candlekeep — needs time in starting area
Choose one "Cespenar can forge Shadows of Amn items" tweak
Item Randomiser Mode 1 needs time in starting area
Make Gromnir a proper Barbarian is redundant if Ascension is installed

sum: Randomizes item placement, store inventories, and treasure across the game. Makes each playthrough's loot different.

co.no: Randomly replaces the WIS tome in TotSC area with one of 6 stat tomes
